subcodes.first_line: As regards the new edifice which thou didst purchase and establish as a Mashriqu'l-Adhkar, thou hadst written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باری در خصوص عمارت جديدی که اشتراء فرموديد و مشرق‌الاذکار قرار داديد مرقوم نموده بوديد
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
